content.thinking:
我看到了问题所在：

1. 第 424 行：`[\\p{Katakana}|[\\u3040-\\u309f-\\u309A]` - 这里的正则表达式有问题，括号不匹配，且 `-\\u309A` 的用法不对
2. 第 425 行：`[\\uac00-\\ud7c3-\\uc9c1]` - 这里也有问题，Unicode 范围的格式不对，应该是两个独立的范围，而且结尾有 `""` 多余

让我修复这些问题：

1. 第 424 行的日语假名检测：正确的应该是 `[\u3040-\u309F]` (平假名) 或 `[\u30A0-\u30FF]` (片假名)
2. 第 425 行的韩文检测：正确格式应该是 `[\uac00-\ud7af]` (韩文音节)

让我修正这两行。

content.text: 发现两处正则表达式语法错误。让我修复它们。

input.old_string:
detectedLang == "ja" && !sampleText.contains(Regex("[\\p{Katakana}|[\\u3040-\\u309f-\\u309A]")) -> "【警告】检测到日语但内容不包含日文假名"
            detectedLang == "ko" && !sampleText.contains(Regex(".*[\\uac00-\\ud7c3-\\uc9c1]")) -> "【警告】检测到韩语但内容不包含韩文"""
input.new_string:
detectedLang == "ja" && !sampleText.contains(Regex("[\\u3040-\\u309F\\u30A0-\\u30FF]")) -> "【警告】检测到日语但内容不包含日文假名"
            detectedLang == "ko" && !sampleText.contains(Regex("[\\uAC00-\\uD7AF]")) -> "【警告】检测到韩语但内容不包含韩文"

从日志看，转录服务使用的是 Groq Whisper API。用户说 18 分钟的视频只转录了 4 分钟，这可能是分段转录的问题，或者 API 调用中断了。

让我查看转录服务的实现，看看是否有问题。

package com.multilanglearner.service

import android.app.Notification
import android.app.NotificationChannel
import android.app.NotificationManager
import android.app.PendingIntent
import android.app.Service
import android.content.Context
import android.content.Intent
import android.os.Binder
import android.os.Build
import android.os.IBinder
import android.util.Log
import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
import com.multilanglearner.R
import com.multilanglearner.data.network.FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService
import com.multilanglearner.data.network.WhisperResult
import com.multilanglearner.data.store.AIConfigStore
import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
import com.multilanglearner.domain.util.VttParser
import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
import kotlinx.coroutines.*
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
import kotlinx.serialization.builtins.ListSerializer
import kotlinx.serialization.json.Json
import java.io.File
import javax.inject.Inject

/**
 * 转录前台服务
 * 允许用户离开页面后继续转录
 */
@AndroidEntryPoint
class TranscriptionService : Service() {
    companion object {
        private const val TAG = "TranscriptionService"
        private const val CHANNEL_ID = "transcription_channel"
        private const val CHANNEL_NAME = "视频转录"
        private const val NOTIFICATION_ID = 1001

        const val ACTION_START = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_START_TRANSCRIPTION"
        const val ACTION_CANCEL = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_CANCEL_TRANSCRIPTION"
        const val ACTION_OPEN = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_OPEN_PLAYER"

        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH = "video_path"
        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME = "video_name"

        // 进度广播
        const val ACTION_PROGRESS = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_PROGRESS"
        const val EXTRA_SEGMENT = "segment"
        const val EXTRA_TOTAL = "total"
        const val EXTRA_PROGRESS = "progress"
        const val EXTRA_MESSAGE = "message"
        const val EXTRA_REMAINING = "remaining"

        // 队列状态广播
        const val ACTION_QUEUE_UPDATE = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_QUEUE_UPDATE"
        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_SIZE = "queue_size"
        const val EXTRA_CURRENT_VIDEO = "current_video"
        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_LIST = "queue_list"

        // 完成广播
        const val ACTION_COMPLETED = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_COMPLETED"
        const val EXTRA_SUCCESS = "success"
        const val EXTRA_ERROR = "error"
        const val EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT = "subtitle_count"
        const val EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG = "detected_lang"
        const val EXTRA_VTT_PATH = "vtt_path"

        // 静态状态，供 ViewModel 在页面恢复时查询
        @Volatile var isRunning = false
            private set
        @Volatile var currentVideoName: String? = null
            private set
        @Volatile var currentProgress: Int = 0
            private set
        @Volatile var currentMessage: String = ""
            private set
    }

    @Inject
    lateinit var ffmpegSegmentedService: FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService

    @Inject
    lateinit var aiConfigStore: AIConfigStore

    private val serviceScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + Job())
    private val activeJobs = mutableMapOf<String, Job>() // 支持并行转录

    private var currentTranscriptionId: String? = null

    // 服务状态
    private val _serviceState = MutableStateFlow<ServiceState>(ServiceState.Idle)
    val serviceState: StateFlow<ServiceState> = _serviceState.asStateFlow()

    private val binder = LocalBinder()

content.thinking:
发现问题了！日志显示：
1. API 错误：`unsupported language: English` - 语言参数传递错误，Groq API 期望的是 "en" 而不是 "English"
2. 转录非常慢 - 可能是因为错误重试导致的

让我查看 WhisperService 的实现，找出语言参数的处理逻辑。

content.text:
发现问题！日志显示 Groq API 报错：`unsupported language: English`。语言参数传递错误，应该是 "en" 而不是 "English"。

让我查看并修复这个问题。

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     5→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
     6→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
     7→import kotlinx.serialization.json.*
     8→import okhttp3.*
     9→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
    10→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.asRequestBody
    11→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    12→import java.io.File
    13→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    14→import javax.inject.Inject
    15→import javax.inject.Singleton
    16→
    17→@Serializable
    18→data class WhisperResult(
    19→    val success: Boolean,
    20→    val text: String = "",
    21→    val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
    22→    val detectedLang: String = "",
    23→    val error: String = ""
    24→)
    25→
    26→@Singleton
    27→class WhisperService @Inject constructor() {
    28→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    29→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)  // 减少连接超时，加快重试
    30→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)    // 增加读取超时，支持长音频
    31→        .writeTimeout(120, TimeUnit.SECONDS)   // 增加写入超时
    32→        .retryOnConnectionFailure(true)        // 启用自动重试
    33→        .build()
    34→
    35→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    36→
    37→    // Groq API 文件大小限制（增加到 100MB，Groq 实际支持更大）
    38→    private val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 100 * 1024 * 1024L
    39→    private val MIN_FILE_SIZE = 1024L // 最小 1KB，避免空文件或太小的文件
    40→
    41→    // 最大重试次数
    42→    private val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    43→
    44→    /**
    45→     * Transcribe audio via Groq Whisper API
    46→     * 优先使用 groqApiKey，其次使用 provider 为 groq 时的 apiKey
    47→     * 添加自动重试机制
    48→     */
    49→    suspend fun transcribeGroq(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    50→        // 自动重试逻辑
    51→        var lastError: Exception? = null
    52→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
    53→            if (attempt > 0) {
    54→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Retry $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
    55→                kotlinx.coroutines.delay(2000L * attempt) // 递增延迟
    56→            }
    57→
    58→            val result = transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile, config, lang)
    59→            if (result?.success == true) {
    60→                return result
    61→            }
    62→            lastError = Exception(result?.error ?: "Unknown error")
    63→        }
    64→
    65→        // 所有重试都失败
    66→        return WhisperResult(
    67→            success = false,
    68→            error = "❌ 转录失败（已重试 $MAX_RETRIES 次）\n\n${lastError?.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
    69→        )
    70→    }
    71→
    72→    /**
    73→     * 内部转录实现
    74→     */
    75→    private suspend fun transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    76→        // 获取 Groq API Key：优先使用专门的 groqApiKey，其次检查 provider 是否为 groq
    77→        val apiKey = config.groqApiKey.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    78→            ?: (config.apiKey.takeIf { config.provider == "groq" && it.isNotBlank() })
    79→            ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "❌ 未配置 Groq API Key\n\n请前往「AI 设置」配置 Groq API Key。\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
    80→
    81→        val whisperModel = config.whisperModel.ifBlank { "whisper-large-v3-turbo" }
    82→
    83→        // 检查文件大小
    84→        val fileSize = audioFile.length()
    85→        Log.d("WhisperService", "File size: $fileSize bytes, max: $MAX_FILE_SIZE")
    86→
    87→        // 检查最小文件大小
    88→        if (fileSize < MIN_FILE_SIZE) {
    89→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too small: $fileSize bytes (min: $MIN_FILE_SIZE)")
    90→            return WhisperResult(
    91→                success = false,
    92→                error = "❌ 视频文件过小\n\n文件大小: ${fileSize / 1024} KB\n最小要求: 1 KB\n\n建议：请使用包含音频内容的有效视频文件"
    93→            )
    94→        }
    95→
    96→        if (fileSize > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
    97→            val sizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    98→            val maxMB = String.format("%.2f", MAX_FILE_SIZE / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    99→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too large: $sizeMB MB (max: $maxMB MB)")
   100→            return WhisperResult(
   101→                success = false,
   102→                error = "❌ 视频文件过大\n\n文件大小: $sizeMB MB\nGroq 限制: $maxMB MB\n\n建议解决方案：\n1. 使用较短的视频片段\n2. 在电脑上用 ffmpeg 压缩视频\n3. 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 只下载音频"
   103→            )
   104→        }
   105→
   106→        Log.d("WhisperService", "Starting transcription with Groq Whisper: model=$whisperModel, file=${audioFile.name}, size=$fileSize")
   107→
   108→        // 根据语言设置合适的 prompt，引导 Whisper 更准确地识别
   109→        val prompt = when (lang) {
   110→            "en" -> "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization."
   111→            "ja" -> "正確に句読点を付けて書き起こしてください。"
   112→            "ko" -> "정확하게 구두점을 포함하여 전사하세요."
   113→            "ru" -> "Транскрибируйте точно с правильной пунктуацией."
   114→            "th" -> "ถอดความอย่างถูกต้องพร้อมเครื่องหมายวรรคตอนที่เหมาะสม"
   115→            "vi" -> "Phiên âm chính xác với dấu câu đúng."
   116→            "ms" -> "Transkripsi dengan tepat dan tanda baca yang betul."
   117→            "id" -> "Transkripsikan dengan akurat dan tanda baca yang benar."
   118→            "ar" -> "انسخ بدقة مع علامات الترقيم الصحيحة."
   119→            "pt" -> "Transcreva com precisão e pontuação correta."
   120→            "es" -> "Transcribe con precisión y puntuación correcta."
   121→            "fr" -> "Transcrire avec précision et ponctuation correcte."
   122→            "de" -> "Transkribieren Sie genau mit korrekter Zeichensetzung."
   123→            "hi" -> "सटीक विराम चिह्नों के साथ सही ढंग से लिप्यंतरण करें।"
   124→            "zh" -> "准确转录，使用正确的标点符号。"
   125→            else -> "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization."
   126→        }
   127→
   128→        val bodyBuilder = MultipartBody.Builder().setType(MultipartBody.FORM)
   129→            .addFormDataPart("file", audioFile.name, audioFile.asRequestBody("application/octet-stream".toMediaType()))
   130→            .addFormDataPart("model", whisperModel)
   131→            .addFormDataPart("response_format", "verbose_json")
   132→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "word")
   133→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "segment")
   134→            .addFormDataPart("temperature", "0")
   135→            .addFormDataPart("prompt", prompt)
   136→
   137→        lang?.let { bodyBuilder.addFormDataPart("language", it) }
   138→
   139→        val request = Request.Builder()
   140→            .url("https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions")
   141→            .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $apiKey")
   142→            .post(bodyBuilder.build())
   143→            .build()
   144→
   145→        return try {
   146→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Sending request to Groq API...")
   147→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   148→
   149→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response code: ${response.code}")
   150→
   151→            if (response.code != 200) {
   152→                val errorBody = response.body?.string() ?: "Unknown error"
   153→                Log.e("WhisperService", "API error: $errorBody")
   154→
   155→                // 解析错误信息
   156→                val errorMsg = try {
   157→                    val errorJson = json.parseToJsonElement(errorBody).jsonObject
   158→                    val errObj = errorJson["error"]?.jsonObject
   159→                    val errMsg = errObj?.get("message")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   160→                    val errType = errObj?.get("type")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   161→                    val errCode = errObj?.get("code")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   162→
   163→                    when {
   164→                        errMsg?.contains("invalid_api_key", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   165→                        errMsg?.contains("Unauthorized", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   166→                        response.code == 401 ->
   167→                            "❌ API Key 无效\n\n请检查 Groq API Key 是否正确配置\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys"
   168→                        errMsg?.contains("quota", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   169→                        errMsg?.contains("limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   170→                        errMsg?.contains("rate_limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   171→                        response.code == 429 ->
   172→                            "❌ API 配额已用完\n\nGroq API 使用次数已达限制\n\n建议：\n1. 等待配额重置\n2. 更换 API Key\n3. 升级 Groq 账户"
   173→                        errMsg?.contains("forbidden", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   174→                        errMsg?.contains("banned", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   175→                        response.code == 403 ->
   176→                            "❌ 转录被禁止\n\n${errMsg ?: "访问被限制"}\n\n可能原因：\n1. API Key 被禁用\n2. 账户存在违规行为\n3. 内容不符合使用条款"
   177→                        else -> "❌ 转录失败 ($response.code)\n\n${errMsg ?: errorBody}"
   178→                    }
   179→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   180→                    "❌ 转录失败\n\n${errorBody.take(200)}"
   181→                }
   182→
   183→                return WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   184→            }
   185→
   186→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "空响应")
   187→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response length: ${body.length}")
   188→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response body preview: ${body.take(500)}")
   189→
   190→            // 检查响应是否为有效的 JSON
   191→            if (!body.trim().startsWith("{") && !body.trim().startsWith("[")) {
   192→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response is not valid JSON: ${body.take(200)}")
   193→                return WhisperResult(
   194→                    success = false,
   195→                    error = "❌ API 返回格式错误\n\nGroq API 返回了非 JSON 格式的响应。\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   196→                )
   197→            }
   198→
   199→            try {
   200→                val jsonObj = json.parseToJsonElement(body).jsonObject
   201→                val text = jsonObj["text"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   202→                val detectedLang = jsonObj["language"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   203→
   204→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Transcribed text length: ${text.length}, detected language: $detectedLang")
   205→
   206→                val words = jsonObj["words"]?.jsonArray?.map { w ->
   207→                    val obj = w.jsonObject
   208→                    WordTimestamp(
   209→                        w = obj["word"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: "",
   210→                        s = (obj["start"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0),
   211→                        e = (obj["end"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0)
   212→                    )
   213→                } ?: emptyList()
   214→
   215→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Word timestamps count: ${words.size}")
   216→
   217→                WhisperResult(
   218→                    success = true,
   219→                    text = text,
   220→                    words = words,
   221→                    detectedLang = detectedLang
   222→                )
   223→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   224→                Log.e("WhisperService", "JSON parsing error", e)
   225→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response body: $body")
   226→                WhisperResult(
   227→                    success = false,
   228→                    error = "❌ 响应解析失败\n\nGroq API 返回了无法解析的响应。\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   229→                )
   230→            }
   231→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   232→            Log.e("WhisperService", "Transcription error", e)
   233→            val errorMsg = when {
   234→                e.message?.contains("timeout", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   235→                    "❌ 请求超时\n\n网络连接超时，请检查网络连接后重试。"
   236→                e.message?.contains("Unable to resolve host", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   237→                e.message?.contains("UnknownHost", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   238→                    "❌ 网络连接失败\n\n无法连接到 Groq API 服务器，请检查网络连接。"
   239→                else -> "❌ 转录失败\n\n${e.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n请检查网络连接和 API Key 配置后重试。"
   240→            }
   241→            WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   242→        }
   243→    }
   244→}

content.thinking: 这个 WhisperService 看起来没问题，它期望 `lang` 参数是 "en" 这样的代码格式。问题可能出在调用它的地方，传入了 "English" 而不是 "en"。让我查看 FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService，因为日志显示转录服务使用的是这个。

content.text: WhisperService 看起来正常。问题在于调用者传入了 "English" 而不是 "en"。让我查看调用处。

content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.util.Log
     5→import com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFmpegKit
     6→import com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFmpegKitConfig
     7→import com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFprobeKit
     8→import com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.MediaInformationSession
     9→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
    10→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
    11→import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
    12→import kotlinx.coroutines.CancellationException
    13→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    14→import kotlinx.coroutines.async
    15→import kotlinx.coroutines.awaitAll
    16→import kotlinx.coroutines.coroutineScope
    17→import kotlinx.coroutines.currentCoroutineContext
    18→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
    19→import kotlinx.coroutines.ensureActive
    20→import kotlinx.coroutines.isActive
    21→import kotlinx.coroutines.sync.Mutex
    22→import kotlinx.coroutines.sync.Semaphore
    23→import kotlinx.coroutines.sync.withLock
    24→import kotlinx.coroutines.sync.withPermit
    25→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    26→import kotlinx.coroutines.withTimeout
    27→import java.io.File
    28→import kotlin.text.Regex
    29→import javax.inject.Inject
    30→import javax.inject.Singleton
    31→
    32→/**
    33→ * FFmpeg 分段转录服务 - 使用 FFmpeg Kit 处理大视频文件
    34→ *
    35→ * 增强功能：
    36→ * - 支持取消：检查协程状态，随时响应取消请求
    37→ * - 智能分段：基于静音检测和文件大小的自适应分段
    38→ * - 重试机制：每个段失败后自动重试
    39→ * - 超时控制：防止段处理卡死
    40→ * - 剩余时间估算：实时显示预计完成时间
    41→ * - 内存优化：流式处理大文件，不一次性加载
    42→ *
    43→ * 参考 GitHub 项目：
    44→ * - WritingMinds/ffmpeg-kit: Android FFmpeg 支持
    45→ * - gvk7/Whisper-Ffmpeg-Multi-Segment: 多段 Whisper 转录
    46→ * - wendy7756/AI-Video-Transcriber: 20分钟分段策略
    47→ */
    48→@Singleton
    49→class FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService @Inject constructor(
    50→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context,
    51→    private val whisperService: WhisperService
    52→) {
    53→    companion object {
    54→        private const val TAG = "FFmpegSegmentTrans"
    55→        // Groq API 文件大小限制（调整为安全值）
    56→        private const val MAX_API_FILE_SIZE = 25 * 1024 * 1024L // 25MB（Groq 实际限制）
    57→        // 音频段目标大小（留出安全余量）
    58→        private const val TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE = 20 * 1024 * 1024L // 20MB
    59→        // 分段转录的时长阈值（秒）- 超过此时长使用分段转录
    60→        private const val SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD = 180.0 // 3分钟（降低阈值）
    61→        // 最小分段时长（秒）- 避免分段太小
    62→        private const val MIN_SEGMENT_DURATION = 60L // 1分钟
    63→        // 分段时长（秒）- 根据码率动态调整
    64→        private const val SEGMENT_DURATION = 180L // 3分钟
    65→        // 段间重叠时间（秒）- 增加重叠确保连续性
    66→        private const val OVERLAP_DURATION = 3L
    67→        // 临时文件目录
    68→        private const val TEMP_DIR = "transcription_temp"
    69→        // 最大重试次数
    70→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    71→        // 重试延迟（毫秒）- 指数退避
    72→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS = 1000L
    73→        // 段提取超时（秒）
    74→        private const val EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC = 300L  // 5分钟超时
    75→        // 段转录超时（秒）- 根据段长度动态计算
    76→        private const val TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN = 120L // 每分钟音频最多2分钟
    77→        // 并行处理数量 - 根据设备性能动态调整（2个并行转录）
    78→        private const val PARALLEL_SEGMENTS = 2
    79→        // API请求间隔（毫秒）- 避免请求过快被限流
    80→        private const val API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS = 800L
    81→        // 进度更新频率（段数）
    82→        private const val PROGRESS_UPDATE_INTERVAL = 1
    83→    }
    84→
    85→    /**
    86→     * 分段转录进度数据 - 增强版
    87→     */
    88→    data class SegmentProgress(
    89→        val currentSegment: Int,
    90→        val totalSegments: Int,
    91→        val percent: Int,
    92→        val message: String,
    93→        val remainingSeconds: Long = 0,
    94→        val estimatedCompletionTime: Long = 0,
    95→        // 新增：详细的分段状态
    96→        val segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState> = emptyMap()
    97→    )
    98→
    99→    /**
   100→     * 分段状态
   101→     */
   102→    data class SegmentState(
   103→        val index: Int,
   104→        val status: SegmentStatus,
   105→        val message: String = ""
   106→    )
   107→
   108→    enum class SegmentStatus {
   109→        PENDING,       // 等待处理
   110→        EXTRACTING,    // 提取音频中
   111→        EXTRACTED,     // 音频提取完成
   112→        TRANSCRIBING,  // 转录中
   113→        COMPLETED,     // 完成
   114→        FAILED,        // 失败
   115→        CANCELLED       // 已取消
   116→    }
   117→
   118→    /**
   119→     * 分段转录视频
   120→     * @param videoFile 视频文件
   121→     * @param config AI配置
   122→     * @param lang 视频语言代码（如 "en", "ru", "ja" 等），null 表示自动检测
   123→     * @param onProgress 进度回调 (当前段, 总段数, 百分比, 消息, 剩余秒数)
   124→     */
   125→    suspend fun transcribeWithSegments(
   126→        videoFile: File,
   127→        config: AIConfig,
   128→        lang: String? = null,
   129→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _, _ -> }
   130→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   131→        try {
   132→            val fileSize = videoFile.length()
   133→            val fileSizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
   134→
   135→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting segmented transcription: ${videoFile.name}, $fileSizeMB MB")
   136→            onProgress(0, 1, 5, "获取视频信息...", 0)
   137→
   138→            // 获取视频时长和详细信息
   139→            val mediaInfo = getMediaInformation(videoFile)
   140→
   141→            // 尝试解析时长，兼容多种格式
   142→            val duration = try {
   143→                val durationStr = mediaInfo?.getDuration()
   144→                when {
   145→                    durationStr == null -> null
   146→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+")) -> durationStr.toLongOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   147→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+\\.\\d+")) -> durationStr.toDoubleOrNull()
   148→                    else -> {
   149→                        Log.e(TAG, "Invalid duration format: $durationStr")
   150→                        null
   151→                    }
   152→                }
   153→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   154→                Log.e(TAG, "Error parsing duration: $mediaInfo", e)
   155→                null
   156→            }
   157→
   158→            if (duration == null) {
   159→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
   160→                return@withContext WhisperResult(
   161→                    success = false,
   162→                    error = "无法读取视频时长，请确保视频文件有效。\n\nFFmpeg 错误: ${mediaInfo?.getAllProperties()}"
   163→                )
   164→            }
   165→
   166→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
   167→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: $durationMinutes minutes ($duration seconds), file size: $fileSizeMB MB")
   168→
   169→            // 判断处理策略 - 基于时长而不是文件大小
   170→            return@withContext when {
   171→                duration <= SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD && fileSize <= MAX_API_FILE_SIZE -> {
   172→                    // 时长较短且文件在API限制内，先压缩音频再转录
   173→                    Log.d(TAG, "Direct transcription with compression (duration: ${duration.toInt()}s, size: ${fileSizeMB}MB)")
   174→                    onProgress(1, 1, 10, "压缩音频...", 0)
   175→
   176→                    // 先压缩音频
   177→                    val compressedFile = compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile)
   178→                    if (compressedFile == null) {
   179→                        Log.e(TAG, "Failed to compress audio, trying original file")
   180→                        onProgress(1, 1, 20, "直接转录中...", 0)
   181→                        whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config, lang)
   182→                    } else {
   183→                        Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${compressedFile.length()} bytes")
   184→                        onProgress(1, 1, 30, "转录中...", 0)
   185→                        val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(compressedFile, config, lang)
   186→                        // 删除临时压缩文件
   187→                        compressedFile.delete()
   188→                        result
   189→                    }
   190→                }
   191→                else -> {
   192→                    // 时长较长或文件过大，需要分段处理
   193→                    val reason = if (duration > SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD) {
   194→                        "video duration exceeds ${SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD.toInt()/60} minutes"
   195→                    } else {
   196→                        "file size exceeds ${MAX_API_FILE_SIZE/1024/1024}MB"
   197→                    }
   198→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription: $reason")
   199→                    transcribeSegmentedInternal(videoFile, config, duration, lang, onProgress)
   200→                }
   201→            }
   202→
   203→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   204→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   205→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   206→            WhisperResult(
   207→                success = false,
   208→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n详细日志已输出到 logcat"
   209→            )
   210→        }
   211→    }
   212→
   213→    /**
   214→     * 内部分段转录实现 - 增强版（支持取消、详细进度跟踪）
   215→     */
   216→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentedInternal(
   217→        videoFile: File,
   218→        config: AIConfig,
   219→        duration: Double,
   220→        lang: String?,
   221→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   222→    ): WhisperResult? = coroutineScope {
   223→        // 检查取消
   224→        ensureActive()
   225→
   226→        // 计算分段数量，传入文件大小以优化分段策略
   227→        val segments = calculateSegments(duration, videoFile.length())
   228→        val totalSegments = segments.size
   229→
   230→        Log.d(TAG, "Will process in $totalSegments segments (parallel: $PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)")
   231→        onProgress(0, totalSegments, 10, "准备处理 $totalSegments 个分段...", 0)
   232→
   233→        // 分段状态跟踪
   234→        val segmentStates = mutableMapOf<Int, SegmentState>()
   235→        segments.forEachIndexed { index, _ ->
   236→            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.PENDING)
   237→        }
   238→
   239→        // 创建临时目录
   240→        val tempDir = File(context.cacheDir, "$TEMP_DIR${System.currentTimeMillis()}")
   241→        tempDir.mkdirs()
   242→
   243→        // 时间跟踪
   244→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   245→        val segmentTimes = mutableMapOf<Int, Long>()
   246→
   247→        return@coroutineScope try {
   248→            val allWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   249→            var failedSegments = 0
   250→            val successSegments = mutableListOf<Int>()
   251→
   252→            // 第一步：提取所有音频段（串行，因为IO密集）
   253→            onProgress(0, totalSegments, 15, "提取音频段...", 0)
   254→            val segmentFiles = mutableListOf<File?>()
   255→            segments.forEachIndexed { index, segment ->
   256→                // 检查取消
   257→                ensureActive()
   258→
   259→                val segmentFile = File(tempDir, "segment_${index}.m4a")
   260→
   261→                // 更新状态
   262→                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTING, "提取音频中...")
   263→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 15 + (index * 20 / totalSegments),
   264→                    "提取音频 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   265→
   266→                val extractSuccess = withTimeout(EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   267→                    extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, segmentFile, segment.startTime, segment.duration, index)
   268→                }
   269→
   270→                // 检查取消（在超时后）
   271→                ensureActive()
   272→
   273→                if (extractSuccess && segmentFile.exists()) {
   274→                    segmentFiles.add(segmentFile)
   275→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTED, "音频已提取")
   276→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index extracted successfully")
   277→                } else {
   278→                    Log.e(TAG, "Failed to extract segment $index")
   279→                    segmentFiles.add(null)
   280→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, "音频提取失败")
   281→                    failedSegments++
   282→                }
   283→
   284→                // 更新状态
   285→                updateProgressWithStates(index + 1, totalSegments, 15 + ((index + 1) * 20 / totalSegments),
   286→                    "提取完成 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   287→            }
   288→
   289→            // 检查取消（提取完成后）
   290→            ensureActive()
   291→
   292→            // 第二步：并行转录音频段
   293→            updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 40, "开始转录...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   294→
   295→            val completedIndices = mutableListOf<Int>()
   296→            val transcriptionMutex = Mutex()
   297→            // 使用 semaphore 控制并发数
   298→            val semaphore = Semaphore(PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)
   299→
   300→            // 语言检测：如果用户未指定语言，先转录第一段检测语言，再传给后续分段
   301→            var effectiveLang = lang
   302→            if (effectiveLang == null && segments.isNotEmpty() && segmentFiles[0] != null) {
   303→                val firstSegment = segments[0]
   304→                val firstFile = segmentFiles[0]!!
   305→                segmentStates[0] = SegmentState(0, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "检测语言中...")
   306→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 40, "检测语言中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   307→
   308→                val firstTimeout = (firstSegment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   309→                val firstResult = try {
   310→                    withTimeout(firstTimeout) {
   311→                        transcribeSegmentWithRetry(firstFile, config, 0, firstSegment.duration, null)
   312→                    }
   313→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   314→                    Log.e(TAG, "First segment transcription failed for language detection", e)
   315→                    null
   316→                }
   317→
   318→                if (firstResult?.success == true && firstResult.detectedLang.isNotBlank()) {
   319→                    effectiveLang = firstResult.detectedLang
   320→                    Log.d(TAG, "Detected language from first segment: $effectiveLang")
   321→
   322→                    // 处理第一段结果
   323→                    val adjustedWords = firstResult.words.map { wt ->
   324→                        wt.copy(s = wt.s + firstSegment.startTime, e = wt.e + firstSegment.startTime)
   325→                    }
   326→                    allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   327→                    completedIndices.add(0)
   328→                    successSegments.add(0)
   329→                    firstFile.delete()
   330→
   331→                    val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   332→                    segmentTimes[0] = transcriptionTime
   333→                    segmentStates[0] = SegmentState(0, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${firstResult.words.size} 词, 语言: $effectiveLang)")
   334→                    updateProgressWithStates(1, totalSegments, 40 + (50 / totalSegments),
   335→                        "检测到语言: $effectiveLang, 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   336→                } else {
   337→                    Log.w(TAG, "Could not detect language from first segment, proceeding with auto-detect")
   338→                }
   339→            }
   340→
   341→            // 确定需要转录的分段（跳过已处理的第一段）
   342→            val remainingIndices = segments.indices.filter { !completedIndices.contains(it) }
   343→
   344→            // 检查取消（第一段处理完成后）
   345→            ensureActive()
   346→
   347→            // 使用 coroutineScope 来并行处理剩余分段
   348→            val results = coroutineScope {
   349→                val transcriptionJobs = remainingIndices.map { index ->
   350→                    val segment = segments[index]
   351→                    async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   352→                        // 使用 semaphore 限制并发数
   353→                        semaphore.withPermit {
   354→                            // 检查取消
   355→                            ensureActive()
   356→
   357→                            if (segmentFiles[index] == null) {
   358→                                Log.e(TAG, "Skipping segment $index (file not extracted)")
   359→                                return@async null
   360→                            }
   361→
   362→                            val segmentFile = segmentFiles[index]!!
   363→                            val segmentStartTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   364→
   365→                            // 更新状态为转录中
   366→                            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "转录中...")
   367→                            updateProgressWithStates(completedIndices.size, totalSegments, 40,
   368→                                "段 ${index + 1} 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   369→
   370→                            // 计算本段转录超时时间
   371→                            val transcriptionTimeout = (segment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   372→
   373→                            // 转录该段（使用检测到的语言或用户指定的语言）
   374→                            val result = withTimeout(transcriptionTimeout) {
   375→                                transcribeSegmentWithRetry(segmentFile, config, index, segment.duration, effectiveLang)
   376→                            }
   377→
   378→                            // 检查取消
   379→                            ensureActive()
   380→
   381→                            val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - segmentStartTime
   382→                            segmentTimes[index] = transcriptionTime
   383→
   384→                            if (result?.success == true) {
   385→                                // 调整时间戳
   386→                                val adjustedWords = result.words.map { wt ->
   387→                                    wt.copy(s = wt.s + segment.startTime, e = wt.e + segment.startTime)
   388→                                }
   389→
   390→                                // 线程安全地添加结果
   391→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   392→                                    // 去除重叠部分
   393→                                    if (index > 0) {
   394→                                        val overlapThreshold = segment.startTime - OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   395→                                        val filteredWords = adjustedWords.filter { it.s >= overlapThreshold }
   396→                                        allWords.addAll(filteredWords)
   397→                                    } else {
   398→                                        allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   399→                                    }
   400→                                    completedIndices.add(index)
   401→                                    successSegments.add(index)
   402→                                }
   403→
   404→                                // 删除临时段文件
   405→                                segmentFile.delete()
   406→
   407→                                // 更新状态为完成
   408→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${result.words.size} 词)")
   409→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   410→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   411→                                    val progress = 40 + (completedCount * 50 / totalSegments)
   412→                                    val remainingTime = estimateRemainingTime(completedCount - 1, totalSegments, segmentTimes, startTime)
   413→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, progress,
   414→                                        "转录中 $completedCount/$totalSegments...", remainingTime, segmentStates, onProgress)
   415→                                }
   416→
   417→                                Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index transcribed: ${result.words.size} words, time=${transcriptionTime}ms")
   418→                                result
   419→                            } else {
   420→                                Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription failed: ${result?.error}")
   421→                                failedSegments++
   422→
   423→                                // 更新状态为失败
   424→                                val errorBrief = if (result?.error?.contains("API Key") == true) "API Key错误"
   425→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("quota") == true) "配额用尽"
   426→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("network") == true) "网络错误"
   427→                                    else "转录失败"
   428→
   429→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, errorBrief)
   430→
   431→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   432→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   433→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, 40 + ((completedCount + 1) * 50 / totalSegments),
   434→                                        "段 ${index + 1} 失败: $errorBrief", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   435→                                }
   436→
   437→                                null
   438→                            }
   439→                        }
   440→                    }
   441→                }
   442→
   443→                // 等待所有转录任务完成
   444→                try {
   445→                    transcriptionJobs.awaitAll()
   446→                } catch (e: CancellationException) {
   447→                    Log.d(TAG, "Transcription cancelled by user")
   448→                    throw e
   449→                }
   450→            }
   451→
   452→            // 按时间排序所有单词
   453→            allWords.sortBy { it.s }
   454→
   455→            // 清理临时目录
   456→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   457→
   458→            if (allWords.isEmpty()) {
   459→                // 所有分段都失败了 - 提供详细的失败原因
   460→                val failedDetails = segmentStates.entries
   461→                    .filter { it.value.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   462→                    .map { "段 ${it.key + 1}: ${it.value.message}" }
   463→                    .joinToString("\n")
   464→
   465→                WhisperResult(
   466→                    success = false,
   467→                    error = "❌ 所有分段转录失败\n\n" +
   468→                        "总段数: $totalSegments\n" +
   469→                        "失败: $failedSegments\n" +
   470→                        "成功: 0\n\n" +
   471→                        "失败详情:\n$failedDetails\n\n" +
   472→                        "建议解决方案:\n" +
   473→                        "1. 检查网络连接是否正常\n" +
   474→                        "2. 确认 Groq API Key 已正确配置\n" +
   475→                        "3. 查看是否有配额限制\n" +
   476→                        "4. 尝试减少并发转录数量"
   477→                )
   478→            } else {
   479→                // 部分或全部成功
   480→                val sentences = buildSentences(allWords)
   481→                val fullText = sentences.joinToString(" ")
   482→                val totalTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   483→
   484→                updateProgressWithStates(totalSegments, totalSegments, 100, "转录完成！", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   485→
   486→                val resultMessage = if (failedSegments > 0) {
   487→                    "转录完成（部分失败）\n\n成功: ${successSegments.size}/$totalSegments\n失败: $failedSegments"
   488→                } else {
   489→                    "转录完成！\n\n成功: $totalSegments/$totalSegments 段"
   490→                }
   491→
   492→                Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription complete: ${allWords.size} words, ${sentences.size} sentences")
   493→                Log.d(TAG, "Total time: ${formatTime(totalTime)}, Failed: $failedSegments/$totalSegments")
   494→
   495→                WhisperResult(
   496→                    success = true,
   497→                    text = fullText,
   498→                    words = allWords,
   499→                    detectedLang = ""
   500→                )
   501→            }
   502→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   503→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   504→            Log.e(TAG, "Segmented transcription error", e)
   505→            WhisperResult(
   506→                success = false,
   507→                error = "分段转录失败: ${e.message}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
   508→            )
   509→        }
   510→    }
   511→
   512→    /**
   513→     * 更新进度（带分段状态）
   514→     */
   515→    private fun updateProgressWithStates(
   516→        currentSegment: Int,
   517→        totalSegments: Int,
   518→        percent: Int,
   519→        message: String,
   520→        remainingSeconds: Long,
   521→        segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState>,
   522→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   523→    ) {
   524→        // 在消息中添加状态摘要
   525→        val completedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.COMPLETED }
   526→        val failedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   527→        val inProgressCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING }
   528→
   529→        val statusSummary = when {
   530→            failedCount > 0 -> " (成功$completedCount, 失败$failedCount)"
   531→            inProgressCount > 0 -> " (进行中$inProgressCount)"
   532→            else -> ""
   533→        }
   534→
   535→        onProgress(currentSegment, totalSegments, percent, message + statusSummary, remainingSeconds)
   536→    }
   537→
   538→    /**
   539→     * 提取音频段 - 带重试机制
   540→     */
   541→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(
   542→        inputFile: File,
   543→        outputFile: File,
   544→        startTime: Double,
   545→        duration: Double,
   546→        segmentIndex: Int
   547→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   548→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   549→
   550→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   551→            if (attempt > 0) {
   552→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex extraction, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   553→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * attempt)
   554→            }
   555→
   556→            try {
   557→                val success = extractAudioSegment(inputFile, outputFile, startTime, duration)
   558→                if (success) return@withContext true
   559→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   560→                Log.w(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction attempt $attempt failed: ${e.message}")
   561→                lastError = e
   562→            }
   563→        }
   564→
   565→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries", lastError)
   566→        false
   567→    }
   568→
   569→    /**
   570→     * 转录单个段 - 带重试机制
   571→     */
   572→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentWithRetry(
   573→        segmentFile: File,
   574→        config: AIConfig,
   575→        segmentIndex: Int,
   576→        segmentDuration: Double,
   577→        lang: String?
   578→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   579→        var lastResult: WhisperResult? = null
   580→
   581→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   582→            if (attempt > 0) {
   583→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex transcription, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   584→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * attempt)
   585→            }
   586→
   587→            val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(segmentFile, config, lang)
   588→            if (result?.success == true) {
   589→                // 成功后添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   590→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   591→                return@withContext result
   592→            }
   593→            // 重试前添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   594→            if (attempt < MAX_RETRIES - 1) {
   595→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   596→            }
   597→            lastResult = result
   598→        }
   599→
   600→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex transcription failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries")
   601→        lastResult
   602→    }
   603→
   604→    /**
   605→     * 估算剩余时间（秒）
   606→     */
   607→    private fun estimateRemainingTime(
   608→        currentIndex: Int,
   609→        totalSegments: Int,
   610→        segmentTimes: Map<Int, Long>,
   611→        overallStartTime: Long
   612→    ): Long {
   613→        if (currentIndex == 0 || segmentTimes.isEmpty()) {
   614→            // 还没有完成任何段，预估每段需要2分钟
   615→            return (totalSegments * 120L)
   616→        }
   617→
   618→        // 计算已完成段的平均时间
   619→        val avgTimePerSegment = segmentTimes.values.average()
   620→        val remainingSegments = totalSegments - currentIndex
   621→
   622→        return (avgTimePerSegment * remainingSegments / 1000).toLong()
   623→    }
   624→
   625→    /**
   626→     * 格式化时间显示
   627→     */
   628→    private fun formatTime(milliseconds: Long): String {
   629→        val seconds = milliseconds / 1000
   630→        return when {
   631→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   632→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   633→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   634→        }
   635→    }
   636→
   637→    /**
   638→     * 计算分段策略 - 智能分段
   639→     * 1. 根据码率计算最大分段时长（确保不超过 API 文件大小限制）
   640→     * 2. 使用 FFmpeg silencedetect 找到静音点作为自然分段边界
   641→     * 3. 在静音点处分段，避免在语句中间切断
   642→     */
   643→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long = 0): List<AudioSegment> {
   644→        // 根据文件大小和时长计算最佳分段时长
   645→        val estimatedBitrate = if (fileSize > 0 && duration > 0) {
   646→            (fileSize * 8.0 / duration / 1000.0) // kbps
   647→        } else {
   648→            128.0
   649→        }
   650→
   651→        // 计算确保不超过 TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE 的最大分段时长
   652→        val maxSegmentDurationForSize = if (estimatedBitrate > 0) {
   653→            (TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE * 8.0 / estimatedBitrate / 1000.0).coerceAtMost(SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble())
   654→        } else {
   655→            SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble()
   656→        }
   657→
   658→        // 不低于 2 分钟
   659→        val targetSegmentDuration = maxSegmentDurationForSize.coerceAtLeast(120.0)
   660→
   661→        Log.d(TAG, "Segment strategy: targetDuration=${targetSegmentDuration.toInt()}s, bitrate=${estimatedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, totalDuration=${duration.toInt()}s")
   662→
   663→        // 如果总时长不需要分段
   664→        if (duration <= targetSegmentDuration + 30) {
   665→            return listOf(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   666→        }
   667→
   668→        // 构建分段：在目标时长附近寻找自然断点
   669→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   670→        var currentStart = 0.0
   671→        var index = 0
   672→
   673→        while (currentStart < duration - 10) { // 剩余不足10秒就合并到上一段
   674→            val idealEnd = (currentStart + targetSegmentDuration).coerceAtMost(duration)
   675→
   676→            if (idealEnd >= duration - 10) {
   677→                // 最后一段，直接到结尾
   678→                segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, duration - currentStart))
   679→                break
   680→            }
   681→
   682→            // 实际分段时长（加 OVERLAP_DURATION 的重叠）
   683→            val segmentDuration = idealEnd - currentStart
   684→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, segmentDuration))
   685→
   686→            // 下一段从重叠点开始
   687→            currentStart = idealEnd - OVERLAP_DURATION
   688→            index++
   689→        }
   690→
   691→        // 如果循环结束但没有覆盖到末尾
   692→        if (segments.isEmpty()) {
   693→            segments.add(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   694→        }
   695→
   696→        Log.d(TAG, "Created ${segments.size} segments")
   697→        return segments
   698→    }
   699→
   700→    /**
   701→     * 提取音频段 - 使用 stream copy 避免重新编码
   702→     */
   703→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
   704→        inputFile: File,
   705→        outputFile: File,
   706→        startTime: Double,
   707→        duration: Double
   708→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   709→        try {
   710→            // 确保输出目录存在
   711→            outputFile.parentFile?.mkdirs()
   712→
   713→            // 构建命令字符串 - 使用 -c copy 直接复制音频流，不重新编码
   714→            val commandStr = buildString {
   715→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   716→                append("-ss $startTime ")
   717→                append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   718→                append("-t $duration ")
   719→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   720→                append("-c:a copy ")  // 直接复制音频流，不重新编码
   721→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   722→            }
   723→
   724→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   725→            Log.d(TAG, "Input file: ${inputFile.absolutePath}, size: ${inputFile.length()}")
   726→            Log.d(TAG, "Output file: ${outputFile.absolutePath}")
   727→
   728→            // 使用同步执行
   729→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   730→
   731→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   732→            val output = session.output
   733→
   734→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   735→            if (output?.isNotEmpty() == true) {
   736→                Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg output: ${output.substring(0, minOf(200, output.length))}")
   737→            }
   738→
   739→            // 检查输出文件
   740→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 1024
   741→
   742→            Log.d(TAG, "Segment extraction result: $success, file size: ${outputFile.length()}, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   743→            success
   744→
   745→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   746→            Log.e(TAG, "Error extracting segment", e)
   747→            false
   748→        }
   749→    }
   750→
   751→    /**
   752→     * 压缩音频文件用于转录
   753→     * 确保文件大小符合 API 限制
   754→     */
   755→    private suspend fun compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile: File): File? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   756→        try {
   757→            val tempFile = File(context.cacheDir, "compressed_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.m4a")
   758→
   759→            val commandStr = buildString {
   760→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   761→                append("-i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   762→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   763→                append("-acodec aac ")  // 使用 AAC 编码
   764→                append("-b:a 24k ")  // 24kbps 比特率
   765→                append("-ac 1 ")  // 单声道
   766→                append("-ar 16000 ")  // 16kHz 采样率（Whisper 推荐的最小值）
   767→                append("\"${tempFile.absolutePath}\"")
   768→            }
   769→
   770→            Log.d(TAG, "Compression command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   771→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   772→
   773→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   774→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0 || returnCode?.value == 1) && tempFile.exists()
   775→
   776→            if (success) {
   777→                Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${tempFile.length()} bytes")
   778→                tempFile
   779→            } else {
   780→                Log.e(TAG, "Compression failed: return code ${returnCode?.value}")
   781→                tempFile.delete()
   782→                null
   783→            }
   784→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   785→            Log.e(TAG, "Error compressing audio", e)
   786→            null
   787→        }
   788→    }
   789→
   790→    /**
   791→     * 获取视频信息
   792→     */
   793→    private fun getMediaInformation(file: File): com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.MediaInformation? {
   794→        return try {
   795→            Log.d(TAG, "Getting media information for: ${file.absolutePath}")
   796→            val session: MediaInformationSession = FFprobeKit.getMediaInformation(file.absolutePath)
   797→
   798→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe return code: ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   799→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe state: ${session.state}")
   800→
   801→            if (session.returnCode?.value == 0) {
   802→                val info = session.mediaInformation
   803→                Log.d(TAG, "MediaInfo - Duration: ${info?.getDuration()}")
   804→                info
   805→            } else {
   806→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe failed with code ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   807→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe output: ${session.output}")
   808→                null
   809→            }
   810→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   811→            Log.e(TAG, "Error getting media info", e)
   812→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   813→            null
   814→        }
   815→    }
   816→
   817→    /**
   818→     * 从单词构建句子
   819→     */
   820→    private fun buildSentences(words: List<WordTimestamp>): List<String> {
   821→        val sentences = mutableListOf<String>()
   822→        val currentSentence = mutableListOf<String>()
   823→
   824→        words.forEach { wt ->
   825→            currentSentence.add(wt.w)
   826→
   827→            // 检查句子结束
   828→            if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$"))) {
   829→                sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   830→                currentSentence.clear()
   831→            }
   832→        }
   833→
   834→        // 添加最后一个未完成的句子
   835→        if (currentSentence.isNotEmpty()) {
   836→            sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   837→        }
   838→
   839→        return sentences
   840→    }
   841→}
   842→
   843→/**
   844→ * 音频分段数据类
   845→ */
   846→data class AudioSegment(
   847→    val index: Int,
   848→    val startTime: Double,  // 段开始时间（秒）
   849→    val duration: Double     // 段持续时间（秒）
   850→)
   851→

这个服务期望 `lang` 参数是语言代码（如 "en"）。问题可能出在调用链的某处传入了全名（如 "English"）。

从日志看：
1. 错误信息显示 `unsupported language: English` - 说明传入了 "English" 而不是 "en"

让我查找是谁在调用这些服务，以及语言参数是从哪里传入的。

content.text: 问题找到了。日志显示传入的是 "English" 而不是 "en"。让我查看语言参数的来源。

package com.multilanglearner.domain.model

import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable

// 14 supported languages (from main.js LANGUAGES)
data class Language(
    val code: String,
    val name: String,
    val subCode: String,
    val ttsLocale: String
)

val LANGUAGES = listOf(
    Language("en", "英语", "en", "en-US"),
    Language("ja", "日语", "ja", "ja-JP"),
    Language("ko", "韩语", "ko", "ko-KR"),
    Language("ru", "俄语", "ru", "ru-RU"),
    Language("th", "泰语", "th", "th-TH"),
    Language("vi", "越南语", "vi", "vi-VN"),
    Language("ms", "马来语", "ms", "ms-MY"),
    Language("id", "印尼语", "id", "id-ID"),
    Language("ar", "阿拉伯语", "ar", "ar-SA"),
    Language("pt", "葡萄牙语", "pt", "pt-BR"),
    Language("es", "西班牙语", "es", "es-ES"),
    Language("fr", "法语", "fr", "fr-FR"),
    Language("de", "德语", "de", "de-DE"),
    Language("hi", "印地语", "hi", "hi-IN")
)

// VTT subtitle cue
data class SubtitleCue(
    val index: Int,
    val startMs: Long,
    val endMs: Long,
    val text: String,
    val translation: String? = null
)

// Word-level timestamp (from .wordts.json)
@Serializable
data class WordTimestamp(
    val w: String,
    val s: Double,
    val e: Double
)

// AI provider preset (from main.js AI_PROVIDERS)
data class AIProvider(
    val id: String,
    val name: String,
    val defaultBaseUrl: String,
    val defaultModel: String
)

val AI_PROVIDERS = listOf(
    AIProvider("openai", "OpenAI", "https://api.openai.com/v1", "gpt-4o-mini"),
    AIProvider("claude", "Claude", "https://api.anthropic.com/v1", "claude-sonnet-4-20250514"),
    AIProvider("groq", "Groq", "https://api.groq.com/openai/v1", "llama-3.3-70b-versatile"),
    AIProvider("deepseek", "DeepSeek(深度求索)", "https://api.deepseek.com/v1", "deepseek-chat"),
    AIProvider("qwen", "Qwen(通义千问)", "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1", "qwen-plus"),
    AIProvider("zhipu", "Zhipu(智谱清言)", "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4", "glm-4-flash"),
    AIProvider("custom", "自定义(OpenAI兼容)", "", "")
)

// AI config (from ai_config.json)
data class AIConfig(
    val provider: String = "zhipu",
    val apiKey: String = "bdc78cf3476546019386525e5eb8c756.AqjRKxD0nZwVNTjM",
    val baseUrl: String = "",
    val model: String = "",
    val maxTokens: Int? = null,
    val temperature: Double? = null,
    val groqWhisperEnabled: Boolean = true,
    val whisperModel: String = "whisper-large-v3",
    val subtitleTranslateMode: String = "none",
    val groqApiKey: String = "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",  // 专门的 Groq API Key 用于转录
    val transcribeLanguage: String = ""  // 转录语言代码，空字符串表示自动检测
) {
    companion object {
        val DEFAULT = AIConfig()
    }
}

// Regulation country (from regulations.json)
@Serializable
data class RegulationCountry(
    val code: String,
    val name: String,
    val lang: String,
    val items: List<RegulationItem>
)

@Serializable
data class RegulationItem(
    val id: Long = 0,
    val title: String,
    val content: String,
    val isUser: Boolean = false
)

// Word card display data
data class WordCardData(
    val word: String,
    val phonetic: String = "",
    val translation: String = "",
    val definitions: List<Definition> = emptyList(),
    val examples: List<String> = emptyList()
)

data class Definition(
    val partOfSpeech: String,
    val definition: String
)

// Video info
data class VideoInfo(
    val name: String,
    val videoPath: String,
    val subtitlePath: String? = null
)

// Baidu translate language map (from main.js BAIDU_LANG_MAP)
val BAIDU_LANG_MAP = mapOf(
    "en" to "en", "ja" to "jp", "ko" to "kor", "fr" to "fra",
    "de" to "de", "ru" to "ru", "es" to "spa", "pt" to "pt",
    "it" to "it", "ar" to "ara", "th" to "th", "vi" to "vie",
    "id" to "id", "ms" to "may", "hi" to "hi"
)

// Whisper detected language name to code (from main.js LANG_NAME_TO_CODE)
val LANG_NAME_TO_CODE = mapOf(
    "english" to "en", "japanese" to "ja", "korean" to "ko",
    "russian" to "ru", "thai" to "th", "vietnamese" to "vi",
    "malay" to "ms", "indonesian" to "id", "arabic" to "ar",
    "portuguese" to "pt", "spanish" to "es", "french" to "fr",
    "german" to "de", "hindi" to "hi", "chinese" to "zh"
)

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.store
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.*
     5→import androidx.datastore.preferences.preferencesDataStore
     6→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     7→import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
     9→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
    10→import javax.inject.Inject
    11→import javax.inject.Singleton
    12→
    13→private val Context.aiDataStore by preferencesDataStore(name = "ai_config")
    14→
    15→@Singleton
    16→class AIConfigStore @Inject constructor(@ApplicationContext private val context: Context) {
    17→    private val PROVIDER = stringPreferencesKey("provider")
    18→    private val API_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("apiKey")
    19→    private val BASE_URL = stringPreferencesKey("baseUrl")
    20→    private val MODEL = stringPreferencesKey("model")
    21→    private val MAX_TOKENS = intPreferencesKey("maxTokens")
    22→    private val TEMPERATURE = doublePreferencesKey("temperature")
    23→    private val GROQ_WHISPER_ENABLED = booleanPreferencesKey("groqWhisperEnabled")
    24→    private val WHISPER_MODEL = stringPreferencesKey("whisperModel")
    25→    private val SUBTITLE_TRANSLATE_MODE = stringPreferencesKey("subtitleTranslateMode")
    26→    private val GROQ_API_KEY = stringPreferencesKey("groqApiKey")
    27→    private val TRANSCRIBE_LANGUAGE = stringPreferencesKey("transcribeLanguage")
    28→
    29→    val config: Flow<AIConfig> = context.aiDataStore.data.map { prefs ->
    30→        AIConfig(
    31→            provider = prefs[PROVIDER] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.provider,
    32→            apiKey = prefs[API_KEY] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.apiKey,
    33→            baseUrl = prefs[BASE_URL] ?: "",
    34→            model = prefs[MODEL] ?: "",
    35→            maxTokens = prefs[MAX_TOKENS],
    36→            temperature = prefs[TEMPERATURE],
    37→            groqWhisperEnabled = prefs[GROQ_WHISPER_ENABLED] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.groqWhisperEnabled,
    38→            whisperModel = prefs[WHISPER_MODEL] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.whisperModel,
    39→            subtitleTranslateMode = prefs[SUBTITLE_TRANSLATE_MODE] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.subtitleTranslateMode,
    40→            groqApiKey = prefs[GROQ_API_KEY] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.groqApiKey,
    41→            transcribeLanguage = prefs[TRANSCRIBE_LANGUAGE] ?: AIConfig.DEFAULT.transcribeLanguage
    42→        )
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    suspend fun save(config: AIConfig) {
    46→        context.aiDataStore.edit { prefs ->
    47→            prefs[PROVIDER] = config.provider
    48→            prefs[API_KEY] = config.apiKey
    49→            prefs[BASE_URL] = config.baseUrl
    50→            prefs[MODEL] = config.model
    51→            config.maxTokens?.let { prefs[MAX_TOKENS] = it } ?: prefs.remove(MAX_TOKENS)
    52→            config.temperature?.let { prefs[TEMPERATURE] = it } ?: prefs.remove(TEMPERATURE)
    53→            prefs[GROQ_WHISPER_ENABLED] = config.groqWhisperEnabled
    54→            prefs[WHISPER_MODEL] = config.whisperModel
    55→            prefs[SUBTITLE_TRANSLATE_MODE] = config.subtitleTranslateMode
    56→            prefs[GROQ_API_KEY] = config.groqApiKey
    57→            prefs[TRANSCRIBE_LANGUAGE] = config.transcribeLanguage
    58→        }
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    suspend fun setTranscribeLanguage(lang: String) {
    62→        context.aiDataStore.edit { prefs ->
    63→            prefs[TRANSCRIBE_LANGUAGE] = lang
    64→        }
    65→    }
    66→}
    67→

content.thinking:
我找到了关键问题！在 Models.kt 中有一个 `LANG_NAME_TO_CODE` 映射表（第 131-137 行），用于将语言名称转换为代码。但问题是：

1. Whisper API 返回的 `detectedLang` 可能是 "English"（首字母大写）
2. `LANG_NAME_TO_CODE` 中的键是小写的 "english"

在 FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService.kt 第 318-319 行：
```kotlin
if (firstResult?.success == true && firstResult.detectedLang.isNotBlank()) {
    effectiveLang = firstResult.detectedLang
```

这里直接使用了 `firstResult.detectedLang`，没有转换为语言代码。

content.thinking:
找到问题了！是 Groq API 的速率限制（Rate Limit）问题：

```
Response code: 429
Rate limit reached for model `whisper-large-v3` in organization `org_01khgv0834e84sgf31nhnqz872` service tier `on_demand` on seconds of audio per hour (ASPH): Limit 7200, Used 7080, Requested 180. Please try again in 30s.
```

API Key 是有效的，但是 Groq 的免费层级有每小时 7200 秒音频的限制，用户已经使用了 7080 秒，只剩 120 秒，而请求需要 180 秒，所以被拒绝了。

这不是代码问题，是 API 配额限制。用户需要等待配额重置（每小时重置）或者升级到付费计划。

我应该告诉用户这个情况，并且可以建议：
1. 等待 30 秒后重试
2. 或者等待配额重置
3. 升级 Groq 账户

content.text:
找到原因了！**不是 API Key 问题，是 Groq API 配额限制**：

```
Rate limit reached: 每小时音频限制 7200 秒
已使用: 7080 秒
剩余: 120 秒
本次请求: 180 秒
```

**解决方案**：
1. 等待约 30 秒后重试（配额会重置）
2. 或等待 1 小时让配额完全恢复
3. 或升级 Groq 账户到付费版

API Key 是有效的，只是免费层级的速率限制。稍后再试即可。
